title: Cusp AI launches an 'AI Materials Foundry' and raises a $450M Series B at a roughly €2.2B valuation
summary: Cusp AI, the AI-materials-discovery startup co-founded by Max Welling (Amsterdam-based) and Chad Edwards, has launched the 'AI Materials Foundry': a global network of 45+ founding partners (NVIDIA, Meta, Samsung, Hyundai Motor Group, Henkel, Applied Materials, Tokyo Electron, Lam Research) pooling compute and scientific resources to accelerate materials discovery for chipmaking and other industries. The launch came with a $450M (€393M) Series B at a roughly €2.2B ($2.6B) valuation, led by Kleiner Perkins and NEA with Jeff Bezos' Bezos Expeditions participating. A privately funded, Welling-anchored push on exactly the AI-driven materials-discovery frontier DiscoveryLabNL is building national public infrastructure for.

title: Nobel laureate Omar Yaghi moves to Tsinghua to lead an AI materials-discovery institute
summary: Omar Yaghi (2025 Chemistry Nobel; the pioneer of metal-organic frameworks) has left UC Berkeley for a full-time chair at Tsinghua University in Beijing, where he will lead a new AI-assisted materials-discovery institute. A high-profile US-to-China move on exactly the frontier DiscoveryLabNL is building for.
